name: Kimiko the Fox Monster
description:
Big fennec fox monster. I cant get over how much I love Lvlirror's art bro 😭 I put a lot of effort into this one, so please tell me how much you enjoy it. To those of you leaving replies, I will get around to them eventually, I just gotta work down my list first 🙏 ALSO JOIN THE DISCORD FOR EASIER REQUESTS AND ALSO FREE YIFF
